nts1.n: The NTS Breakfast Show w/ ERROL AND ALEX RITA
SOUP TO NUTS W/ SCARY THINGS
nts1.d: Friday mornings get scary - Bempah & JK elevating your vibe right in time for the weekend.
Raj Chaudhuri - aka Raji Rags. NTS since day one. Always eclectic, never boring. Raj rustles up a seamless monthly mix that journeys through the BPMs.
Iconic queer party crew Adonis showcase their residents on a monthly rotation live from the London studio.

nts1.n: WAYA FYAM W/ PRIESTE$$ TELZZZZZZ - Women in Ke HipHop
nts1.d:
Waya Fyam dives into Nairobi’s wild soundscape – shrap bars, kapuka, and dancehall riddims. Mixing these with moombahton, a Dutch-born sound built on the same Caribbean grooves, to show how Kenyan street energy links up with global club culture. Expect heavy bass, raw slang, and pure movement.
From the host: "This mix starts with a poem from Maya Angelou asking us to be better people, to be stronger in everything we do, to leave a mark that brings hope when you are long gone. For this episode of Waya Fyam we celebrate the women making a difference in Kenyan HipHop"

nts1.n: BASHMENT SOUND w/ Shadow Fyah - Rise & Toast (Live in Miami)
nts1.d:
Miami-based producers and DJs Silent Addy and Disco Neil present Bashment Sound – a regular celebration of Caribbean sounds gone global.
From the host: "Silent Addy on the decks with Shadow Fyah (Bashment Sound) on the mic, recorded live at Rise & Toast at The Urban Miami — March 8, 2026. Pure dancehall energy from one of Miami’s biggest Sunday day parties."

Martha is a DJ and broadcaster from South London with roots in community radio and documentary making. Each of Martha’s thoughtfully curated radio shows navigate the fringes of electronic music, with a clear narrative that is grounded in community and storytelling.
House, techno, pop mutations and club kid rhythms from NYC-based DJ and producer Flirty800, going live from the London studio.

Oldies, jungle, hip hop, bass music, and more from legendary Florida DJ hopper1000.
From the host: _"Legendary Swaglord Irene Lee joins hopper1000 radio for a great chat about life, hopper1000 drops many unreleased songs. 
EVERYONE HAVE A BLESSED FREAKIN WEEK, BE YOURSELF NO MATTER WHAT BOX PEOPLE TRY N PUT YOU INTO. WE ALL HAVE A SPECIAL PURPOSE AND WE MUST FOLLOW THAT!"_

Journeys through the past, present, and future of dance culture with The co-founder of techno and elevator of house music, Kevin Saunderson. Expect deep blends of house, techno, electro, and disco alongside stories of the scenes and sounds that shaped them.

Bass weight and sound system musik from DEEP MEDi - sharing styles from the label's new crop of producers, and picking out gems from their 150+ releases back catalogue. KEEP YOUR MEDi DEEP
From the host: _"We're celebrating 20 years of releasing sound system music in 2026!
Goth-Trad's been a consistent part of our journey since "Cut end" in 2007!
Japan meets MEDi : 100% Goth-Trad productions 💥"_

nts1.n: EL SABOR DE LA CIUDAD W/ REGAL86
nts1.d:
Monterrey-born club producer extraordinaire Regal86 presents 'El Sabor de la Ciudad', or 'The Taste of The City' laying out the sounds that have inspired him and his regular guests, past and present.
From the host: "Trax & Samples"

nts1.n: THE ONE GLOVE BREAKFAST SHOW W/ Stu Clark
WE ARE... W/ PAUL CAMO & Ranie Ribeiro
AS I WAS MOVING AHEAD - A Quiet Place

nts2.n: VIBRATIONS FOR A BETTER WORLD W/ AOKI TAKAMASA (R)

nts2.d: A deeper look into the back catalogs of various artists.

Get in your feelings with Brussels party starters HE4RTBROKEN - the beloved Belgian collective that aren't scared of a few tears on the dance floor. Resident djs Liyo, Steff, Munix and ssaliva explore the full range of cathartic music listening together with some kindred-spirited emotive guests.
Spanish alt pop songwriter Lorea selects a deep hour of influences, including contemporary chamber compositions, Spanish folk, as well as unreleased original music.
Danish label Posh Isolation join us for an hour a month.
Leaf through songwriter Calvin LeCompte’s monthly selection via The Uline Catalog…

nts2.n: CREEP ZONE W/ JAMES PANTS & MARC SCHALLER
nts2.d: Stones Throw's James Pants joins forces with Marc Schaller for an hour-long dive into dreamy electronics, wired sounds and experimentation.

nts2.n: world of pain w/ dagmar zuniga (R)
nts2.d: the meek shall inherit the girth
James McNew of Hoboken indie rock royalty Yo La Tengo shares an hour of picks from his collection each month..
Leftfield Pop, Bedroom Z-sides and Music Box Covers…

This month’s journey winds upward through the deserts of North Africa, across Sudan and Palestine, and northward still into Lebanon. Along the way, I’ve gathered sounds from both Eastern and Western Europe, with echoes reaching as far as Japan, Jamaica and Brazil. The pace runs a little faster here, the BPM is bit higher in this one to carry me through these final weeks of summer, sweet and fleeting, filled with moonlit gatherings and the first whispers of cooler winds.

nts2.n: AXCESS AMNESIA W/ JENNY SAYAKA NONO
nts2.d: Filmmaker Jenny Sayaka Nono brings her manic VHS hued style to the audio airwaves, with steely coldwave, industrial, synth pop & more.

Yesterday's News: a thorough re-cap of the finest in punk, noise, garage and other ratty guitar sounds from the past few decades.
From the host: "100% Japanese Punk/Hardcore/Garage Rock"

nts2.n: Trapdoor w/ Neil Krug - Window Pane Jane
nts2.d: Neil Krug is an American visual artist, director, and photographer based in Los Angeles. Tune in for a sonic lysergic tale of love, heartbreak, and redemption.

nts2.n: BORN FOR BURNING W/ PAINKILLER KIM
Hit Factory W/ DJ Wawa - City Pop Special (R)
THE OPERA SHOW w/ Daniel Oduntan, Seyi Adelekun & Raheel Khan

subtle.n: BASICS RECORDS: L MAJOR, TAMEN & SIDESHOW

subtle.d: Get ready to embark on a captivating sonic journey of underground music with Charlie Kelly. Including new and timeless sounds from the depths of rap, drill, grime, and experimental genres from the vibrant streets of the UK and beyond. Charlie unearths the very best in music that pushes boundaries. Off the mic, Charlie is a Radio Producer and Social Media Executive with an eclectic music taste spanning across many different cultures, decades, and styles. Hailing from North London with a love for audio and pop culture, you can expect to hear tune after tune when you’re locked into Charlie Kelly on Subtle.
BirdE brings an hour of the freshest Drum and Bass covering everything from liquid to techy steppers - the deeper the better.

Originally from Cambridge, Counter Culture's selection deftly navigates across a myriad of influences and exclusives from himself & friends.
Expect some of the freshest rolling soul straight to your headspace.

subtle.n: Strictly Business Show w/ Qua Rush & Flipz MC
What's The Weather, Selecta? w/ Megan Wroe

subtle.d:
Hailing from Mumbai, now living in London, Chaitu is energised by the UK sound and scene.

With a love of all things weird, weighty and groovy; his mixes and productions bridge electro, techno, breaks, UKG and Jungle, with sprinklings of everything in between.

Chaitu champions provocative beats that break down the barriers of style, genre and expectation, all while keeping you moving.

In:flux Audio are a record label based in Leeds, UK founded by production duo Tik&Borrow. Since the label's inception in October 2013, they have dabbled in multiple dance music styles with the emphasis always being on the tracks being unique, and packed full of bass. Today the primary output for the label is from their Dubstep roster and this is focus of their show on Subtle - giving the artists and remixers chance to showcase their sounds with an hour guest mix, all hosted by label bossman Tik.

I’m a 19 year old DJ and producer from Newcastle upon Tyne, mainly playing and producing music around the 140bpm mark. I started out playing old 2-step and jungle records, before moving my focus to mainly dubstep and grime. Along with my friends Pirata and White Label, I run Newcastle’s only current 140 night, Well Irie.

subtle.n: THE CULTURE HEAD w. SAINT VOX
Skelecta presents: South London Dance Factory

subtle.d: With a monthly show on Subtle, Niceup is a London based DJ with a unique style. Pushing UKG, Breakbeat, Bass, Electro and 140. Weaving through genres showcasing new releases and older cuts.

Jedah started DJ'ing at the tender age of 18 years of age specialising in UK Garage/Grime. 

Jedah is currently the DJ for Grime Original Hollowman Jendor of the former Grime Collective Essentials/ OG's.

Responsible for “that massive grime tune with the Psycho strings”, UK producers/DJs Trends & Boylan are well versed in what the scene has to offer. They use this platform to showcase music from across the 140 spectrum from Grime to Dubstep. Anything goes!!

XOSÉ is a DJ and aspiring producer mixing and making mostly UK Garage, Grime and UK Funky. FORWARD PRESSURE largely focuses on the aforementioned UK born genres, though you can expect a variety of UK influenced sounds.

Sempra is a producer & DJ based in London, specialising in the fusion of UK Garage, Jungle and Breakbeat with dreamy vocal melodies and the beautiful instrumentation found in Soul and contemporary RnB. Sempra’s consistent output has been released by labels such as Future Classic and Headroom, gaining industry support from the likes of Nia Archives, Sherelle, Yung Singh and Dr Dubplate.

Cicely is a northern raised London based music photographer and DJ. From learning to mix during lockdown, she has since played at clubs across the country in venues such as Fabric, Corsica and Fold.

Cicely runs a collective and events night under the name NRG CRU which focus heavily on the high energy rave sound. She is highly influenced by the northern sound she grew up with, and you can hear this within her sets. Expect heavy blends of techno and hardcore while she shines the light on her favourite northern artists.

dublab.n: Daddy Differently and Dirty Dave - Things of Life
dublab.d: It’s the simple things isn’t it? The little things of life. Good food, sunshine, no traffic, dark coffee, 72˚ breeze, telephone off the hook and music every Friday morning a la Daddy Differently & Dirty Dave.

dublab.n: DJ Bird of Paradigm –  Paradigm Power Hour
Ill Camille x Jesse Fairfax - The Sweeter the Juice
Ryan Lee Moore – Holy Ghost Honky Tonk
Nia Michelle, Jordan Collins, Lewis Thompson – Channels
Echo Park Film Center - Optical Track

dublab.d: “Dying Songs focuses on melancholic electronic music but isn’t limited to that. Sometimes it gets dark, sometimes I try to mix techno awkwardly, sometimes i get nostalgic… I like stuff that’s dreamy, ghostly, pretty and sad. I’ll try out new productions of my own, as well. I’m keeping it pretty open and we’ll see how it evolves.” – Jimmy

dublab.n: Digital Drums OR NO ONE TURNED AWAY
Daddy Differently and Dirty Dave - Things of Life
dublab.d: It’s the simple things isn’t it? The little things of life. Good food, sunshine, no traffic, dark coffee, 72˚ breeze, telephone off the hook and music every Friday morning a la Daddy Differently & Dirty Dave.
